raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.0,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Is the 'check' primarily for technical accuracy (logical consistency, evidence-claim alignment, novelty assessment) or for presentation (structural reorganization, writing polish)?","rationale":{"RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is load-bearing as a cross-cutting responsibility to ensure the artifact transparently communicates any limitations or uncertainties in the described method.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing to prevent exaggeration of the model's capabilities or results in the artifact.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is load-bearing to confirm that the artifact stays within the bounds of its stated contributions and evaluations.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is load-bearing to identify any potential misuse risks of the SelectGNN model described in the artifact.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is load-bearing to verify the origins and reproducibility of the claims and benchmarks mentioned in the artifact."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Is the 'check' primarily for technical accuracy (logical consistency, evidence-claim alignment, novelty assessment) or for presentation (structural reorganization, writing polish)?

rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is load-bearing as a cross-cutting responsibility to ensure the artifact transparently communicates any limitations or uncertainties in the described method.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing to prevent exaggeration of the model's capabilities or results in the artifact.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is load-bearing to confirm that the artifact stays within the bounds of its stated contributions and evaluations.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is load-bearing to identify any potential misuse risks of the SelectGNN model described in the artifact.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is load-bearing to verify the origins and reproducibility of the claims and benchmarks mentioned in the artifact.
